/usr/bin/c++  -arch arm64 -Wl,-search_paths_first -Wl,-headerpad_max_install_names CMakeFiles/cop290_assignment_1.dir/cop290_assignment_1_autogen/mocs_compilation.cpp.o CMakeFiles/cop290_assignment_1.dir/main.cpp.o CMakeFiles/cop290_assignment_1.dir/ui/mainwidget.cpp.o CMakeFiles/cop290_assignment_1.dir/ui/colourpanel.cpp.o CMakeFiles/cop290_assignment_1.dir/ui/controlpanel.cpp.o CMakeFiles/cop290_assignment_1.dir/ui/shapepanel.cpp.o CMakeFiles/cop290_assignment_1.dir/ui/floatingmenu.cpp.o CMakeFiles/cop290_assignment_1.dir/canvas/mycanvas_draw.cpp.o CMakeFiles/cop290_assignment_1.dir/canvas/mycanvas_mouse.cpp.o CMakeFiles/cop290_assignment_1.dir/canvas/mycanvas_clipboard.cpp.o CMakeFiles/cop290_assignment_1.dir/canvas/undoredo.cpp.o CMakeFiles/cop290_assignment_1.dir/shapes/base.cpp.o CMakeFiles/cop290_assignment_1.dir/shapes/base_equal_hack.cpp.o CMakeFiles/cop290_assignment_1.dir/shapes/uniform.cpp.o CMakeFiles/cop290_assignment_1.dir/shapes/lines.cpp.o CMakeFiles/cop290_assignment_1.dir/shapes/rectangle.cpp.o CMakeFiles/cop290_assignment_1.dir/svg/Svg2Data_File.cpp.o CMakeFiles/cop290_assignment_1.dir/svg/Svg2Data_Xml.cpp.o CMakeFiles/cop290_assignment_1.dir/svg/Data2Vec.cpp.o CMakeFiles/cop290_assignment_1.dir/svg/Data2Shape.cpp.o CMakeFiles/cop290_assignment_1.dir/svg/Shape2Data.cpp.o CMakeFiles/cop290_assignment_1.dir/svg/Vec2Svg.cpp.o CMakeFiles/cop290_assignment_1.dir/svg/shape_registry.cpp.o CMakeFiles/cop290_assignment_1.dir/svg/shape_loaders_1.cpp.o -o cop290_assignment_1 -F/opt/homebrew/lib  -Wl,-rpath,/opt/homebrew/lib /opt/homebrew/lib/QtWidgets.framework/Versions/A/QtWidgets /opt/homebrew/lib/QtGui.framework/Versions/A/QtGui -framework AppKit -framework OpenGL -framework ImageIO -framework Metal /opt/homebrew/lib/QtCore.framework/Versions/A/QtCore -framework IOKit -framework DiskArbitration -framework UniformTypeIdentifiers
